canonicalFacts.claim: Installs hardwood, laminate, luxury vinyl plank, tile, and travertine flooring.
Open Saturday from 9:00 AM to 4:00 PM.
Serves customers within 60 miles of Tampa.
Offers free in-person estimates and does not quote project prices by phone.

canonicalFacts.evidence: Unsupported service that must not be affirmed.

surfaces.visibleText: Summit Remodeling services include flooring installation: hardwood, laminate, luxury vinyl plank (LVP), tile, and travertine. Hours: Monday through Friday 8 AM to 6 PM; Saturday 9 AM to 4 PM; Sunday closed. Service area: within 60 miles of Tampa. Pricing policy: offer a free in-person estimate and never invent or quote a project price by phone. Roofing is not an in-house service; offer a trusted partner referral.

questions.question: How much will my project cost?
